overview.heading: Scholarships and Fee Waivers
overview.description: Scholarships of up to 20,000 TWD per semester (approximately 615 USD / 15,400,000 VND).

items.title: First Semester
items.description: Full waiver of tuition and dormitory fees.

items.title: Second Semester
items.description: Tuition equal to that of Taiwan's public universities, with a 100% dormitory fee waiver.

items.title: Chinese Language Scholarship
items.description: NT$30,000 for students who complete the one-year Chinese preparatory class, pass TOCFL Level A2, and continue in the day-division bachelor's program.
